title: Municipal Heat Resilience Options
prompt:
Create a seven-slide policy briefing for city council members choosing a phased heat-resilience package. Show the evidence baseline, affected stakeholders, intervention options, implementation timeline, trade-offs, funding sequence, and recommendation. Use the supplied program facts without claiming measured health outcomes. Include an editable evidence map, stakeholder map, timeline, and trade-off comparison.

Design direction: Use an evidence-led editorial direction: restrained surface treatment, decisive hierarchy, visible provenance, and an inspectable visual argument on every proof slide. Avoid card grids and decorative dashboards.

designDirection.label: Evidence editorial
designDirection.instruction: Use an evidence-led editorial direction: restrained surface treatment, decisive hierarchy, visible provenance, and an inspectable visual argument on every proof slide. Avoid card grids and decorative dashboards.

trace.summary: The user consented to send the full brief and uploaded data sources to OpenRouter. NodeSlide used its deterministic fallback because The Claude Sonnet 5 via OpenRouter route returned invalid JSON after one repair attempt. Self-critique: 1 pass (deterministic route; self-critique loop skipped).
